index.welcomeSubtext: Your boards are ready and waiting for you.
index.editSortWarning: Warning: there is at least one board which does not have a valid last edited date. This is probably a remainder from a board created in an old version of Kanri. Please edit all boards at least once to mitigate this behaviour.
index.createBoardPrompt: Create a board to get started with tracking your tasks better.
index.importDataPrompt: You can import data from other sources using the import/export menu:
index.getUpdatesHeading: Want to get the latest updates and chat with the creator?
index.deleteActionConfirmationText: Are you sure you want to delete the board {boardName}? This action is irreversible.
index.loadBoardsErrorDescription: Kanri kept the interface available, but board data could not be loaded yet.

kanban.deleteBoardConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete the board '{boardName}'? This action is irreversible.

settings.settingsHeadingSubtext: Change the behaviour of the application here.
settings.setThemeAuto: Automatically set theme based on system preference
settings.customThemeEditorHeading: Select the colors for your custom theme:
settings.customThemeImportHeadingSubtext: Note: imports override your current theme so export any custom theme which you don't want to lose in advance!
settings.colorResetText: If the colors do not update, please click
settings.preferencesSubtext: Change the behaviour of your Kanban boards.
settings.preferencesZoomSubtext: Adjust the global zoom level for your boards.
settings.preferencesAddToTopButtonSubtext: Displays a button which allows you to add new cards to the top of a column.
settings.preferencesDisplayNumberOfCardsHeading: Display number of cards in column
settings.preferencesDisplayNumberOfCardsSubtext: Shows how many cards are in each column.
settings.preferencesDefaultRelativeDueDatesHeadin: Use relative due date countdown by default
settings.preferencesDefaultRelativeDueDatesSubtex: Newly set due dates default to relative countdown mode instead of absolute date.
settings.languageSelectorSubtext: Change the language of the application.
settings.miscellaneousAnimationsSubtext: Disable this option to remove all animations in the app.
settings.miscellaneousDeleteAllDataSubtext: This will irreversibly delete all of your data!
settings.miscellaneousDisableSpellcheckSubtext: Disables the built-in spellchecking functionality in all input fields.
settings.exportThemeDialogTitle: Select file to export data to
settings.loadJsonErrorMessage: Could not load JSON file! Please check if the file is proper JSON.
settings.parseJsonErrorMessage: Could not load JSON file! Please check if the file is formatted correctly and is not from an old version of Kanri.

import.importExportSubtext: Manage your data by exporting and importing it from and to Kanri.
import.importTabSubtext: Import full data or individual boards from Kanri, KanbanElectron or Trello®
import.importTabPartialSubtext: One file equals one board to import. Note: you can select multiple files/boards to import at once.
import.importTabFullSubtext: Imports complete data from one file. WARNING: This overrides all of your data with what you import! You may want to export your data first.
import.exportTabPartialSubtext: A partial export means that you receive one .json file for one individual board.
import.exportTabFullSubtext: Exports all of your data (boards, themes, other preferences like zoom) into one .json file.
import.exportFullJsonDialogTitle: Select file to export data to
import.exportPartialJsonDialogTitle: Select file to export board to
import.importErrorBadJson: Could not load JSON file! Please check if the file is correct.
import.importErrorGoodJsonFaultyData: Could not load JSON file! Please check the file is formatted correctly and not from an old version of Kanri.
import.importErrorNoBoards: Cannot load files with no boards. Please import a file with at least one board.
import.importErrorTrello: Could not load JSON file! Please check the file is formatted correctly.
import.importErrorTrelloConversion: Could not convert your Trello board. Please try again and report this bug to the developer if it happens again.
import.importErrorKanbanElectron: Could not load JSON file! Please check the file is formatted correctly and exported from the lastest version of KanbanElectron.
import.importErrorGithub: The file {file} is not a valid board exported from GitHub projects. If you believe this is a bug, please open a GitHub issue or email {email}
import.importDuplicateBoard: The board {boardName} already exists (board with the same ID). Do you want to import as a duplicate?

column.deleteColumnConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete the column '{columnName}'? This action is irreversible.

card.deleteCardConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete the card '{cardName}'? This action is irreversible.
card.deleteAllColumnCardsConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete all the cards in column '{columnName}'? This action is irreversible.
card.deleteAllColumnCardsConfirmationTitle: Delete all cards in this column

attachments.title: Attachments
attachments.largeFileConfirmation: The file "{fileName}" is larger than 100 MB. Add it anyway?
attachments.dropFiles: Drop files here or add an attachment.

assetLibrary.title: Board library
assetLibrary.noMatches: No files match the current filters.
assetLibrary.noReferences: This file is not attached to any card or task on this board.
assetLibrary.deleteReferencedWarning: This file is still referenced by cards or tasks and cannot be deleted.
assetLibrary.removeReferencedWarning: The file could not be removed because it is still referenced.
assetLibrary.blobCleanupFailed: Library entry removed, but blob cleanup failed: {error}
assetLibrary.fileRemoved: File removed from the board library.
assetLibrary.batchDeleteAllReferenced: All selected files are still referenced by cards or tasks and cannot be deleted.
assetLibrary.batchDeleteConfirmation: Delete {count} selected files from this board library? {skipped} referenced files will be skipped.
assetLibrary.batchDeleteCompleted: {count} files removed from the board library. {skipped} referenced files skipped.
assetLibrary.referenceMissingMetadata: This reference cannot be opened because its card metadata is missing.

cardTags.title: Edit card tags
cardTags.description: Here you can edit your global tags, which are available for the entire board. Note: Deleting a global tag does not remove them from cards, but only makes it unavailable for new cards.

changelog.title: What's new in Kanri {major}.{minor}.{revision}?
changelog.welcome: Welcome to Kanri! After a while, we are back with a release featuring lots of important fixes and a few small new features. To quickly get notified about new releases and see the development progress, you can join
changelog.changeItem1: Fixed a bug where moving a card while searching moved the wrong card.
changelog.changeItem2: Added setting to automatically set light/dark mode based on the system preference.
changelog.changeItem3: Added a feature to allow marking due dates as completed.
changelog.changeItem4: Fixed a bug where deleting a board would not remove it from the sidebar pins.

editCard.attachmentErrors:
Some files could not be attached:
{details}
editCard.missingAttachmentMetadata: This attachment could not be opened because its file metadata is missing.

help.title: Help & Resources
help.resources: Here are some useful resources to assist you.
help.ctrl+b: - Create new column in board view
help.ctrl+d: - Delete last column in board view
help.ctrl+t: - Edit title of last column in board view
help.ctrl+n: - Create new card inside last column in board view
help.ctrl+alt+<>: (Arrow keys) - Switch columns for title editing and card adding
help.creditsText1: App licensed under the GPLv3 license (except some files with different licenses designated in their appropriate license headers/files). Icons used are from Heroicons and Phosphor Icons.
help.creditsText2: We are not affiliated, associated, authorized, endorsed by or in any way officially connected to Trello, Inc. (www.trello.com).

newBoard.name: Board name
newBoard.placeholder: Enter a name for the board

renameBoard.title: Rename board
renameBoard.name: Board Name
renameBoard.placeholder: Enter a new name for the board
